title: meliosma pinnata subsp. barbulata
intro: Meliosma pinnata subsp. barbulata, also known as the 'Mountain Meliosma', is a plant species native to the Philippines and other parts of Southeast Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Meliosma pinnata subsp. barbulata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and treat skin irritations. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions that are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
